seo.title: Building Research Agents with Agno + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build research agents with Agno + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Agno is a lightweight, model-agnostic framework for building multi-modal research agents that perform web search, analysis, and synthesis tasks. Research agents handle complex multi-step workflows where accuracy, source reliability, and recency are critical. Vex guardrails prevent hallucinations, verify claims against sources, and ensure consistent structured outputs, making your agents production-ready.

architectureOverview.heading: Research Agents Architecture with Agno
architectureOverview.description:
Agno research agents typically follow a multi-agent architecture with specialized roles: a Router Agent dispatches queries to Search, Analysis, and Synthesis Agents. The Search Agent uses tools like Tavily or DuckDuckGo for web scraping and knowledge retrieval. Analysis Agents process multi-modal inputs (text, images, PDFs) and extract structured claims with sources. The Synthesis Agent compiles results into coherent summaries with citations.

Memory management via Agno's session state prevents fabricated recall, while structured output schemas ensure parseable JSON responses. Team coordination happens through shared context and message passing between agents. Common workflows include topic research, competitor analysis, and real-time news summarization.

The architecture scales horizontally by adding specialized agents for fact-checking, bias detection, or domain-specific analysis.

risks.name: Multi-modal agent misinterpreting image or audio inputs
risks.description: Vision models in research agents may incorrectly OCR charts or misinterpret infographics, leading to false claims
risks.mitigation: Vex verifies extracted data against source text and cross-checks with multiple vision models

risks.name: Agentic session memory recalling fabricated past interactions
risks.description: Long-running research sessions invent previous search results or conversations
risks.mitigation: Vex memory validation checks session state against verifiable sources and timestamps

risks.name: Structured output failing validation on complex nested schemas
risks.description: Citation schemas with nested source metadata fail Pydantic validation during synthesis
risks.mitigation: Vex ensures schema compliance with recursive validation and fallback generation

risks.name: Team agent coordination producing contradictory sub-results
risks.description: Search and Analysis agents produce conflicting facts about the same entity
risks.mitigation: Vex cross-verifies inter-agent outputs and flags contradictions before synthesis

implementation.title: Basic Research Agent Setup
implementation.description: Create a Router Agent that coordinates search and analysis for research queries
implementation.code:
from agno.agent import Agent
from agno.models.openai import OpenAIChat

from agno.tools.search import TavilySearch

router = Agent(
    model=OpenAIChat(id="gpt-4o"),
    name="Research Router",
    instructions="Route research queries to Search or Analysis agents",
    tools=[TavilySearch(max_results=5)]
)

search_agent = Agent(
    model=OpenAIChat(id="gpt-4o"),
    name="Web Search",
    instructions="Find authoritative sources for research queries"
)

result = router.run('Latest developments in quantum computing hardware')

implementation.title: Structured Output Schema
implementation.description: Define citation-aware output schema for research synthesis
implementation.code:
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from typing import List, Optional
from agno.schema import Schema

class Citation(BaseModel):
    url: str
    title: str
    snippet: str
    recency_score: float = Field(..., ge=0, le=1)

class ResearchClaim(BaseModel):
    claim: str
    confidence: float
    citations: List[Citation] = []
    sources_verified: bool = False

class ResearchReport(BaseModel):
    summary: str
    key_findings: List[ResearchClaim]
    sources: List[str]

report_schema = Schema(ResearchReport)

implementation.title: Multi-Step Research Workflow
implementation.description: Chain search вҶ’ analysis вҶ’ synthesis with session memory
implementation.code:
from agno.session import Session

session = Session()

# Step 1: Search
search_results = search_agent.run(
    "Competitor analysis: pricing strategies of SaaS companies",
    session=session
)

# Step 2: Analyze with sources
analysis = analysis_agent.run(
    f"Analyze: {search_results}",
    tools=[report_schema],
    session=session
)

# Step 3: Synthesize
final_report = synthesis_agent.run(
    f"Create executive summary: {analysis}",
    tools=[report_schema],
    session=session
)

print(final_report)

implementation.title: Multi-Modal Research Agent
implementation.description: Handle research queries with image/PDF analysis
implementation.code:
from agno.tools.vision import VisionTool

research_agent = Agent(
    model=OpenAIChat(id="gpt-4o"),
    name="MultiModal Research",
    instructions="""Analyze research materials including:
    - Web search results
    - Charts, graphs, screenshots
    - Research papers (PDFs)
    Extract structured claims with sources""",
    tools=[
        TavilySearch(),
        VisionTool(),
        report_schema
    ]
)

# Handles images automatically
result = research_agent.run(
    "Analyze this market research chart [image] and recent web data"
)

vexIntegration.title: Wrap agent.run() with vex.verify()
vexIntegration.description: Basic decorator integration for source verification and claim accuracy

vexIntegration.title: Session Memory Validation
vexIntegration.description: Prevent fabricated recall in long-running research sessions
vexIntegration.code:
from vex import SessionVerifier
from agno.session import Session

session_verifier = SessionVerifier(
    verify_memory=True,
    source_check=True,
    max_session_age='1h'
)

@session_verifier
@verify(claims=True)
def multi_step_research(query: str, session: Session):
    # Multi-agent workflow
    search_results = search_agent.run(query, session=session)
    analysis = analysis_agent.run(search_results, session=session)
    return synthesis_agent.run(analysis, session=session)

# Safe long-running research
session = Session()
report = multi_step_research('Quarterly earnings analysis', session)

vexIntegration.title: Structured Schema + Vex Validation
vexIntegration.description: Ensure complex nested research schemas pass validation

cta.heading: Secure Your Agno Research Agents
cta.description: Install Vex today with `pip install vex-sdk` and wrap your agents to eliminate hallucinations and ensure source accuracy.
